obsbase.base
============

.. py:module:: obsbase.base


Classes
-------

.. autoapisummary::

   obsbase.base.Base


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:class:: Base(vault, path)

   Represents an Obsidian Base definition.

   A Base contains one or more views that can be executed against a vault.


   .. py:attribute:: vault


   .. py:attribute:: path


   .. py:attribute:: views


   .. py:method:: run(index=0)

      Execute a view.

      Parameters
      ----------
      index : int, default=0
          Index of the view to execute.

      Returns
      -------
      ResultSet
          Matching notes.
